title: SmoothCraft
description: A fast and simple modpack to boost your fps and enhance your gameplay.
body:
# SmoothCraft


The **SmoothCraft** mod pack is meticulously designed to deliver an optimized Minecraft experience, focusing on enhancing performance and ensuring smooth gameplay. Through extensive research and testing, SmoothCraft consistently outperforms many other optimization solutions, making it a top choice for players seeking a seamless experience. 

SmoothCraft prioritizes maintainability and simplicity, which means it does not include unnecessary quality-of-life or visual enhancements by default. Players are encouraged to add any additional mods they desire to customize their experience.

This design allows for rapid updates, ensuring the mod pack can incorporate the latest performance enhancements and quickly adapt to new Minecraft versions, often within hours of their release. I am dedicated to keeping SmoothCraft at the forefront of optimization.

## Included Mods (29)

- **AppleSkin** - Visualizes hunger and saturation levels for better food management.
- **BadOptimizations** - Reduces unnecessary calculations to enhance performance.
- **BetterF3** - Customizes the F3 debug screen for improved readability.
- **C2ME** - Optimizes chunk rendering and loading for better performance.
- **Cloth Config** - Provides configuration settings for other mods.
- **Clumps** - Merges XP orbs into clumps, reducing lag.
- **Continuity** - Adds support for connected textures, enhancing visuals.
- **Distant Horizons** - Enables LOD rendering for distant terrain.
- **Enhanced Block Entities** - Optimizes block entity rendering for performance.
- **Entity Culling** - Culls entities outside the player’s view to boost FPS.
- **Entity Texture Features** - Supports additional textures for mobs and entities.
- **FerriteCore** - Reduces RAM usage for block states, optimizing memory.
- **ImmediatelyFast** - Enhances performance by optimizing immediate mode rendering.
- **Indium** - Improves rendering support for Sodium and Iris mods.
- **Iris** - Adds stunning shader support to enhance visuals.
- **Lithium** - Enhances server-side physics and game logic for better performance.
- **ModernFix** - Optimizes chunk loading and game internals.
- **ModMenu** - Adds a mod options menu for better mod management.
- **More Culling** - Extends culling optimizations for efficient rendering.
- **NoChatReports** - Disables chat reporting for enhanced privacy.
- **OkZoomer** - Provides customizable zoom functionality.
- **Reese's Sodium Options** - Customizes Sodium mod settings.
- **Sodium** - Significantly improves rendering performance.
- **Sodium Extra** - Adds extra performance improvements to Sodium.
- **Sodium Culling** - Optimizes chunk and entity culling further.
- **Sound Physics Remastered** - Enhances sound propagation for realism.
- **ThreadTweak** - Optimizes multi-threading for better performance.
- **VMP** - Boosts chunk rendering performance in multiplayer.
- **Yet Another Config Lib** - Lightweight configuration library for various mods.

## Installation Guide for SmoothCraft

There are two easy ways to install the **SmoothCraft** mod pack:

### Method 1: Using Modrinth

1. **Download the Modrinth App**
   - Visit the [Modrinth website](https://modrinth.com/) and download the Modrinth app.

2. **Open the SmoothCraft MRPack**
   - Launch the Modrinth app and open the **SmoothCraft.mrpack** file.

3. **Run the Instance**
   - After the pack is loaded, run the instance directly through the Modrinth app. You're good to go! Enjoy your optimized Minecraft experience!

### Method 2: Using ZIP Conversion

1. **Convert MRPack to ZIP**
   - Go to [Jamie's MRPack to ZIP converter](https://jamie.codeberg.page/mrpack-to-zip/) and upload your **SmoothCraft.mrpack** file.

2. **Download the Converted ZIP**
   - After the conversion is complete, download the ZIP file.

3. **Install the Mods**
   - Extract the contents of the downloaded ZIP file.
   - Drag and drop the mods, configs, and other necessary files into your Minecraft folder (typically located at `C:\Users\<YourUsername>\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft` on Windows).

4. **Launch Minecraft**
   - Start Minecraft and enjoy your optimized gameplay with the SmoothCraft mod pack!
